description: Record of a falsobordone in music document.
title: Record – falsobordone.

Document.title: Document
Document.description: Document or artifact containing the described falsobordone.

id.title: Reference ID
id.description: Name by which this document is referenced within the database.

name.title: Name
name.description: 'Friendly' name by which the source is often referred to

medium.title: Medium
medium.description: By what means the document was produced.

category.title: Category
category.description: What kind of document it is.

links.title: Links
links.description: Links containings data related to the source.

tonusID.title: Tonus
tonusID.description: Number of tonus (as a Latin number or label).

variantID.title: Tonus termination variant
variantID.description: Reference to termination variant of the psalmtone.

tonusInDocument.title: Tonus in document
tonusInDocument.description: How the tonus is described in the document. Note: may contain TEI.

Falsobordone.title: Falsobordone
Falsobordone.description: A record containing information about falsobordone.

titleInDocument.title: Title (as in document)
titleInDocument.description: How the music is entitled in the source.

layout.title: Part layout
layout.description: How are the composition's parts (voices) layed out in the source.

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.description: Data derived from the transcribed source (but not necessarily contained in (or directly derivable from) the MEI file, from which they cannot be trivially derived. Per hemistich.

cf.title: Cantus Firmus
cf.description: How is cantus firmus treated in the composition

part.title: Part label (standardized)
part.description: Which part is it (note: the original voice labeling should be provided within the MEI file.

tenor_pitches.title: Recit pitches (tenor)
tenor_pitches.description: The written pitch(es) corresponding to cantus firmus's tenor (reciting) pitch. Usually it's only one pitch.

final_pitch.title: Final pitch (terminatio)
final_pitch.description: The written pitch corresponding to cantus firmus's last note of terminatio

intonatio.title: Intonation presence
intonatio.description: Is intonatio present in the cf arrangement?

bass.$comment: TO DO: if CF is a real bass, in 'cf' set only 'voice' without setting the rest. Or refer it to 'bass'...?
bass.title: Bass (real)

Part.title: Part (or voice)
Part.description: A description of a single part of a composition.

nameInDocument.title: Part name (in document)
nameInDocument.description: How part is named within the document. Can contain TEI.

folio.title: Folio
folio.description: On which folio(s) the part is written.

staff.title: Staff number annotation
staff.description: On which folio's staff the voice is written (counting from 1) OR the staff closest to preceeding part position.

staffAnnotation.title: Staff position comment
staffAnnotation.description: If the part is located on a staff in such a way that providing an exact staff number is problematic, provide a comment.
examples: An additional handwritten staff between 3rd and 4th staff on the print's page. [staff: 3]
An additional handwritten staff on the page margin. [staff: 3]

links.title: Links
links.description: Links containings data related to the source.

item.$comment: TO DO: make this schema 'extend' Link schema such that it has compulsory type 'image', 'IFFF' or 'audio' (?) for linkType property.

PartID.title: Standard part name
PartID.description: A typical name of this part.
PartID.$comment: TO DO: use some more formal convention.

PitchID.title: Pitch ID
PitchID.description: A letter name of a pitch.

RecitPitch.title: Reciting tone
RecitPitch.description: Written pitch of the reciting tone.
